CodeSystemDisplayDefinition
  DE87http://smart.who.int/immunizations/CodeSystem/IMMZ.DCounselling on functions of the immunological system

Explaining to the client or caregiver how the vaccines work by triggering the body to produce an immune response

  DE88http://smart.who.int/immunizations/CodeSystem/IMMZ.DAdvising about functions of the immunological system

Explaining to the client or caregiver how the vaccines work by triggering the body to produce an immune response

  DE89http://smart.who.int/immunizations/CodeSystem/IMMZ.DEducation to influence immunization behaviours

Public health interventions to improve general and accurate understanding and impacts of vaccines, and their role in preventing various diseases
